column1: # 2bRAD-tag AND 16S vs whole-genome between-strain distance concordance (Strain2bScan).

# Strain2bScan build BcgI tags; 16S: longest barrnap gene, 21-mer Jaccard. distance=-ln(2J/(1+J)).
# Spearman of pairwise distance vs whole-genome; CI = 2.5/97.5 pctile over 500 genome subsamples (80%).
